GXDLMSRegister.Description: Ch. 1 Sum Li Power factor Last avg. 1 Rate 0 (0 is total)
Ch. 1 Sum Li Power factor Billing period avg. (since last reset) Rate 0 (0 is total)
Ch. 0 Error object #1
Manufacturer specific
Ch. 0 Passive calendar name
Ch. 0 Date of activation of the passive calendar

Item.Item: FF FF FF FF FF FF
FF FF FF FF FF FF

GXDLMSRegister.Description: Ch. 0 Man. spec. abstract object
Manufacturer specific
Manufacturer specific
Manufacturer specific

GXDLMSProfileGeneric.Description: Ch. 0 Load profile with recording period 1 #1
Ch. 0 Data of billing period Scheme 1 #1 Unspecified number of most recent billing periods

GXDLMSRegister.Description: Ch. 0 Time of operation, total
Ch. 0 No. of configuration program changes
Ch. 0 Billing period counter (1) #255
Ch. 0 No. of power failures in phase L1
Ch. 0 No. of power failures in phase L2
Ch. 0 No. of power failures in phase L3
Ch. 0 No. of power failures in all three phases
Ch. 0 Battery use time counter
Ch. 0 State of the internal control signals, global
Ch. 0 Internal operating status, global
